---
title: "March 23 EDA"
author: "Casper Liao, Henry Tan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, #displaying actual code
                      error = TRUE, # still knit even with errors
                      tidy.opts=list(width.cutoff=80), 
                      tidy  = TRUE, # tidy up spacing for R code
                      eval = TRUE, collapse = TRUE, comment = NA)

# collapse = TRUE, code and result tucked together into one cohesive gre box
# comment = NA, normally add ## before the output
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df <- read.csv("Students Social Media Addiction.csv")
head(df)
```

```{r}
str(df)

```


Data Exploration

```{r}
# str(df)


# check for NA's
sum(is.na(df))

rows <- nrow(df)
rows
df <- na.omit(df)
rows <- nrow(df)
rows

names(df)
str(df)

# create indexing for binary v.s. continuous

```

```{r}
table(df$Age)
```
